dependencies.description: Autoconf -- system configuration part of autotools
dependencies.name: autoconf

dependencies.description: Automake -- make file builder part of autotools
dependencies.name: automake

dependencies.description:
The NVIDIA HPC SDK is a comprehensive suite of compilers, libraries and
tools essential to maximizing developer productivity and the performance
and portability of HPC applications. The NVIDIA HPC SDK C, C++, and
Fortran compilers support GPU acceleration of HPC modeling and
simulation applications with standard C++ and Fortran, OpenACC
directives, and CUDA. GPU-accelerated math libraries maximize
performance on common HPC algorithms, and optimized communications
libraries enable standards-based multi-GPU and scalable systems
programming. Performance profiling and debugging tools simplify porting
and optimization of HPC applications.
dependencies.name: c

dependencies.description:
GNU Make is a tool which controls the generation of executables and
other non-source files of a program from the program's source files.
dependencies.name: gmake

dependencies.description:
The GNU config.guess and config.sub scripts versioned by timestamp.
This package can be used as a build dependency for autotools packages
that ship a tarball with outdated config.guess and config.sub files.
dependencies.name: gnuconfig

dependencies.description: libtool -- library building part of autotools.
dependencies.name: libtool

dependencies.description:
This library contains miscellaneous utilities and is not part of the
Xlib standard. It contains routines which only use public interfaces so
that it may be layered on top of any proprietary implementation of Xlib
or Xt.
dependencies.name: libxmu

dependencies.description:
Mesa is an open-source implementation of the OpenGL specification - a
system for rendering interactive 3D graphics.
dependencies.name: mesa

dependencies.description:
Tcl (Tool Command Language) is a very powerful but easy to learn dynamic
programming language, suitable for a very wide range of uses, including
web and desktop applications, networking, administration, testing and
many more. Open source and business-friendly, Tcl is a mature yet
evolving language that is truly cross platform, easily deployed and
highly extensible.
dependencies.name: tcl

dependencies.description:
Tk is a graphical user interface toolkit that takes developing desktop
applications to a higher level than conventional approaches. Tk is the
standard GUI not only for Tcl, but for many other dynamic languages, and
can produce rich, native applications that run unchanged across Windows,
Mac OS X, Linux and more.
dependencies.name: tk

dependent_to.description:
XCrySDen is a crystalline and molecular structure visualisation program
aiming at display of isosurfaces and contours, which can be superimposed
on crystalline structures and interactively rotated and manipulated.
dependent_to.name: xcrysden

description:
Tcl-Togl provides a platform independent Tcl/Tk widget for using OpenGL
rendering contexts
name: tcl-togl

variants.description: Build and link with shared libraries
variants.name: 64bit

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system

variants.description: Build and link with shared libraries
variants.name: shared

variants.description: Build and link with stub libraries
variants.name: stubs
